name: Demo
meaning: Demolition work including selective interior or exterior tear-out before new construction or renovation can begin.

subDepartments.name: Interior Demo
subDepartments.meaning: Selective interior demolition: removing walls, ceilings, flooring, cabinetry, fixtures, or finishes inside an existing structure.

subDepartments.name: Exterior Demo
subDepartments.meaning: Exterior demolition: tearing out siding, roofing, windows, doors, decks, or other exterior elements prior to replacement or renovation.

name: Framing
meaning: Wood or metal framing work covering the full range from heavy structural elements to light interior partitions and rough carpentry backing.

subDepartments.name: Structural Framing — Load Bearing
subDepartments.meaning: Load-bearing wall framing, structural headers, LVL beams, posts, columns, and shear walls. Requires engineering review. Higher labor and material cost than light framing.

subDepartments.name: Light Framing — Interior Non-Load Bearing
subDepartments.meaning: Interior partition walls, soffits, dropped ceilings, and furring that carry no structural load. Faster and lower cost per linear foot than structural framing.

subDepartments.name: Roof Framing
subDepartments.meaning: Roof structure framing including stick-built rafters, ridge beams, collar ties, trusses, and roof deck sheathing.

subDepartments.name: Floor Framing
subDepartments.meaning: Floor structure framing including joists, rim joists, LVL beams, bridging, subfloor sheathing, and ledger attachment for additions or decks.

subDepartments.name: Rough Carpentry
subDepartments.meaning: Miscellaneous rough wood work that supports other trades: blocking for cabinets, grab bars, and fixtures; nailers; backing boards; PT sill plates; and temporary bracing.

name: Carpentry & Millwork
meaning: All finish and rough carpentry beyond structural framing — interior trim, exterior millwork, stairs, and custom built-in woodwork.

subDepartments.name: Finish Carpentry — Interior Trim
subDepartments.meaning: Interior finish carpentry: base molding, door and window casings, crown molding, chair rail, wainscoting, and coffered ceilings. Skilled detail work with higher labor rate than rough carpentry.

subDepartments.name: Finish Carpentry — Exterior Trim
subDepartments.meaning: Exterior trim carpentry: fascia, soffit boards, corner boards, frieze boards, decorative brackets, and exterior door and window trim and casing.

subDepartments.name: Stair Work
subDepartments.meaning: Stair construction or refinishing: treads, risers, stringers, newel posts, balusters, handrails, and skirt boards. Custom stair work carries premium labor rates.

subDepartments.name: Custom Built-Ins & Shelving
subDepartments.meaning: Custom built-in shelving, entertainment centers, window seats, mudroom benches, closet systems, and bookcases. High-skill millwork with material and labor premium.

subDepartments.name: Interior Doors & Hardware
subDepartments.meaning: Interior door installation including pre-hung or slab doors, door frames, hardware, hinges, and associated trim work.

name: Roofing
meaning: All roofing work including material installation, flashings, underlayment, and associated drainage systems.

subDepartments.name: Asphalt Shingle Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: Asphalt shingle roof installation or replacement including ice and water shield, underlayment, ridge cap, and flashings.

subDepartments.name: Metal Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: Standing seam or metal panel roof installation including structural requirements for low-pitch metal roofs.

subDepartments.name: Flat / Low-Slope Roofing
subDepartments.meaning: EPDM, TPO, or modified bitumen flat or low-slope roof systems including insulation boards and drainage details.

subDepartments.name: Gutters & Downspouts
subDepartments.meaning: Seamless aluminum or copper gutter installation, downspouts, gutter guards, and proper grading away from foundation.

name: Siding & Exterior
meaning: Exterior cladding, trim, windows, doors, and related weather envelope work.

subDepartments.name: Vinyl / Fiber Cement Siding
subDepartments.meaning: Vinyl siding or fiber cement board and batten installation including house wrap, trim, and corner pieces.

subDepartments.name: Wood / Cedar Siding
subDepartments.meaning: Cedar shingle, lap, or board siding installation including priming and back-priming before installation.

subDepartments.name: Windows & Exterior Doors
subDepartments.meaning: Window and exterior door replacement or new installation including rough opening modifications, flashing, trim, and casing.

subDepartments.name: Decks & Porches
subDepartments.meaning: New deck or porch construction including framing, decking material (composite or wood), railings, stairs, and ledger attachment.

subDepartments.name: Stucco / EIFS
subDepartments.meaning: 3-coat traditional stucco or EIFS exterior insulation and finish system application over masonry or framed walls.

name: Insulation
meaning: Thermal and acoustic insulation work for walls, ceilings, floors, and attic spaces.

subDepartments.name: Batt / Blown Insulation
subDepartments.meaning: Fiberglass batt, mineral wool batt, or blown-in cellulose/fiberglass insulation for walls, attics, and floors.

subDepartments.name: Spray Foam Insulation
subDepartments.meaning: Open-cell or closed-cell spray polyurethane foam insulation for rim joists, walls, rooflines, or comprehensive air sealing.

subDepartments.name: Rigid Foam / Continuous Insulation
subDepartments.meaning: Rigid foam board (XPS, EPS, or polyiso) installed on exterior walls, under slabs, or in roof assemblies for continuous thermal break.

name: Drywall
meaning: Drywall hanging, taping, finishing, and skim coat plaster work for interior walls and ceilings.

subDepartments.name: Hang & Tape
subDepartments.meaning: Drywall board installation, taping, and three-coat finishing to paint-ready Level 4 or Level 5 surface.

subDepartments.name: Skim Coat / Plaster
subDepartments.meaning: Skim coat plaster over existing walls or ceilings to restore or create a smooth finish surface.

subDepartments.name: Patch & Repair
subDepartments.meaning: Localized drywall patching for holes, water damage, or after trade rough-in work — smaller scope than full hang and tape.

name: Electrical
meaning: All electrical work including service upgrades, wiring, panels, outlets, fixtures, and code compliance items.

subDepartments.name: Service Upgrade / Panel
subDepartments.meaning: Electrical service panel upgrade, new main or sub-panel installation, or meter base replacement. Requires utility coordination.

subDepartments.name: Full Rewire
subDepartments.meaning: Whole-home or large-area electrical rewire replacing knob-and-tube, aluminum wiring, or obsolete systems with new circuits throughout.

subDepartments.name: Rough-In Wiring
subDepartments.meaning: New circuit rough-in for additions, renovations, or specific rooms — conduit or NM cable, boxes, and breakers before drywall.

subDepartments.name: Fixtures & Devices
subDepartments.meaning: Electrical finish work: outlets, switches, dimmers, light fixtures, ceiling fans, and cover plates after drywall.

subDepartments.name: Low Voltage / Data / AV
subDepartments.meaning: Low voltage work: structured wiring, data and coax drops, security system wiring, camera rough-in, and speaker or AV prewire.

name: Plumbing
meaning: All plumbing work including supply and drain lines, fixtures, water heaters, and associated rough and finish work.

subDepartments.name: Rough-In / New Lines
subDepartments.meaning: New supply or drain/waste/vent rough-in piping for additions or remodels — run before drywall or concrete.

subDepartments.name: Repiping
subDepartments.meaning: Full or partial repipe replacing old galvanized, polybutylene, or failing copper supply lines with PEX or copper.

subDepartments.name: Fixture Installation
subDepartments.meaning: Plumbing finish work: sinks, faucets, toilets, tubs, showers, dishwashers, and appliance water hookups.

subDepartments.name: Water Heater
subDepartments.meaning: Water heater replacement or new installation — tank, tankless (on-demand), or heat pump water heater.

subDepartments.name: Drain / Sewer Work
subDepartments.meaning: Underground drain line work, sewer lateral repair or replacement, clean-out installation, or main drain snaking and camera inspection.

name: HVAC
meaning: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning including equipment, ductwork, controls, and related mechanical systems.

subDepartments.name: Equipment Replacement
subDepartments.meaning: Full HVAC equipment replacement: gas furnace, central AC, heat pump, or mini-split system installation including refrigerant line sets.

subDepartments.name: Ductwork
subDepartments.meaning: New duct system design and installation, supply and return trunk and branch ducts, register boxes, and balancing dampers.

subDepartments.name: Ventilation / Exhaust
subDepartments.meaning: Bathroom exhaust fans, kitchen range hood duct work, dryer vent, whole-house ERV or HRV systems, and fresh air intakes.

subDepartments.name: Controls & Thermostats
subDepartments.meaning: Smart thermostat installation, zone control systems, damper actuators, and programmable HVAC control upgrades.

name: Flooring
meaning: All flooring installation including subfloor prep and finish flooring materials.

subDepartments.name: Subfloor Prep & Leveling
subDepartments.meaning: Subfloor repair, sistering joists, self-leveling underlayment, or backer board installation before finish flooring goes down.

subDepartments.name: LVP / Laminate
subDepartments.meaning: Luxury vinyl plank or laminate flooring installation including underlayment, transitions, and base shoe.

subDepartments.name: Hardwood — Solid or Engineered
subDepartments.meaning: Solid or engineered hardwood flooring installation, nail-down or glue-down, including sanding and site-finishing if required.

subDepartments.name: Tile Flooring
subDepartments.meaning: Porcelain, ceramic, or natural stone tile floor installation including backer board, mortar bed, grout, and sealing.

subDepartments.name: Carpet
subDepartments.meaning: Carpet and pad installation including tack strips, seaming, and transitions to adjacent flooring.

name: Tile & Stone
meaning: Wall and floor tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, showers, and other wet or decorative areas.

subDepartments.name: Shower & Tub Surround
subDepartments.meaning: Full shower or tub surround tile installation including waterproofing membrane (Schluter, RedGard, or Wedi), backer, mortar bed, grout, and caulk joints.

subDepartments.name: Bathroom Floor Tile
subDepartments.meaning: Bathroom floor tile installation including backer board, mortar, grout, and transitions — often coordinated with shower tile scope.

subDepartments.name: Kitchen / Bath Backsplash
subDepartments.meaning: Kitchen or bathroom backsplash tile installation including layout, mastic or thinset, grout, and edge trim or schluter strip.

subDepartments.name: Feature Wall / Accent Tile
subDepartments.meaning: Decorative tile accent wall, fireplace surround, or custom tile pattern installation — often higher material cost and detailed layout.

name: Cabinets & Countertops
meaning: Kitchen and bathroom cabinetry and countertop supply and installation.

subDepartments.name: Kitchen Cabinets
subDepartments.meaning: Kitchen cabinet installation including base cabinets, wall cabinets, tall pantry units, crown molding, toe kicks, and hardware.

subDepartments.name: Vanity / Bath Cabinets
subDepartments.meaning: Bathroom vanity, linen cabinet, or medicine cabinet installation including mirror and accessory mounting.

subDepartments.name: Stone Countertops — Quartz / Granite
subDepartments.meaning: Quartz or granite countertop templating, fabrication, and installation including sink cutout, edge profile, and backsplash if applicable.

subDepartments.name: Other Countertops — Laminate / Solid Surface
subDepartments.meaning: Laminate, solid surface, butcher block, or tile countertop installation — lower cost per SF than natural stone.

name: Painting & Finishes
meaning: Interior and exterior painting, staining, and decorative finish work.

subDepartments.name: Interior Painting — Walls & Ceilings
subDepartments.meaning: Interior wall and ceiling painting including prep, priming, and two finish coats. Priced per square foot of wall surface or by room.

subDepartments.name: Interior Painting — Trim & Doors
subDepartments.meaning: Interior trim, door, and cabinet painting including sanding, priming, and finish coats. Higher labor rate than walls due to cut-in detail work.

subDepartments.name: Exterior Painting / Staining
subDepartments.meaning: Exterior painting or staining of siding, trim, doors, and shutters including pressure wash prep, caulking, and primer.

subDepartments.name: Cabinet Painting / Refinishing
subDepartments.meaning: Kitchen or bathroom cabinet door and box refinishing with sprayed or rolled enamel — prep, degloss, prime, and finish coats.

name: Concrete & Masonry
meaning: Concrete flatwork, foundations, block, brick, and stone masonry work.

subDepartments.name: Concrete Flatwork
subDepartments.meaning: Poured concrete slabs, driveways, walkways, patios, and garage floors including forming, rebar, and finishing.

subDepartments.name: Foundation Work
subDepartments.meaning: Foundation repair, underpinning, waterproofing, new footings, piers, or slab-on-grade foundation for additions.

subDepartments.name: Block / Brick / Stone
subDepartments.meaning: CMU block, brick, or natural stone construction for walls, chimneys, retaining walls, steps, and veneer applications.

subDepartments.name: Fireplace & Chimney
subDepartments.meaning: Fireplace and chimney construction, repair, repointing, relining, or cap and crown replacement.

name: Permits & Engineering
meaning: Building permits, engineering drawings, inspections, and code compliance documentation.

subDepartments.name: Building Permit
subDepartments.meaning: Municipal building permit application, fee payment, and inspection coordination for the project scope.

subDepartments.name: Structural Engineering / Drawings
subDepartments.meaning: Structural engineering calculations, architectural drawings, or site plan preparation required for permit submission.

subDepartments.name: HOA Approval
subDepartments.meaning: Homeowners association application, submission of plans, and approval coordination prior to work start.
